name: Standard Confidentiality
description: Recipient shall not disclose Confidential Information to third parties

name: Permitted Disclosure
description: Confidential Information may be disclosed to employees with need-to-know

name: Return of Materials
description: Upon termination, all confidential materials must be returned or destroyed

name: Termination for Convenience
description: Either party may terminate with written notice

name: Termination for Cause
description: Either party may terminate immediately upon material breach

name: Effect of Termination
description: Surviving obligations continue after termination

name: Limitation of Liability
description: Total liability shall not exceed the fees paid under this agreement

name: Exclusion of Consequential Damages
description: Neither party shall be liable for indirect, consequential, or punitive damages

name: Mutual Indemnification
description: Each party shall indemnify the other against third-party claims

name: IP Indemnification
description: Provider indemnifies against IP infringement claims

name: Payment Terms
description: Payment due within specified days of invoice

name: Late Payment Interest
description: Late payments accrue interest at specified rate

name: Work Product Ownership
description: All work product created under this agreement belongs to the client

name: Pre-existing IP
description: Each party retains ownership of pre-existing intellectual property

name: License Grant
description: Provider grants a license to use deliverables for intended purpose

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Parties agree to process personal data in accordance with applicable laws

name: Data Security
description: Appropriate technical and organizational measures shall be implemented

name: Data Breach Notification
description: Processor shall notify controller of data breach within 72 hours

name: Governing Law
description: This agreement shall be governed by the laws of the specified jurisdiction

name: Dispute Resolution
description: Disputes shall be resolved through arbitration

name: Force Majeure
description: Neither party liable for failure due to circumstances beyond reasonable control

name: Auto-Renewal
description: Agreement automatically renews unless notice given

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Provider commits to specified uptime percentage

name: SLA Credits
description: Service credits applied for downtime exceeding agreed thresholds

name: Support Response Time
description: Provider commits to response times based on severity levels

name: Non-Competition
description: Parties agree not to compete in specified areas during term

name: Non-Solicitation
description: Parties agree not to solicit each other's employees

name: Assignment
description: Agreement may not be assigned without prior written consent

name: Amendment
description: Agreement may only be amended in writing signed by both parties

name: Entire Agreement
description: This agreement constitutes the entire understanding between parties

name: Severability
description: If any provision is invalid, remaining provisions continue in effect

name: Waiver
description: Failure to enforce any provision shall not constitute a waiver

name: Notices
description: All notices shall be in writing and sent to specified addresses

name: Insurance Requirements
description: Provider shall maintain specified insurance coverage

name: Warranty
description: Provider warrants that services will be performed in professional manner

name: Warranty Disclaimer
description: Except as expressly stated, no other warranties are made

name: Scope of Work
description: Detailed description of services to be provided

name: Change Orders
description: Changes to scope must be documented and approved in writing

name: Deliverables
description: Specific outputs and milestones to be delivered

name: Acceptance Criteria
description: Criteria for accepting deliverables and review periods

name: Definition of Confidential Information
description: What constitutes confidential information under this agreement

name: Exclusions from Confidentiality
description: Information that is not considered confidential

name: Term of Agreement
description: Duration and effective date of the agreement

name: Regulatory Compliance
description: Parties shall comply with all applicable laws and regulations

name: Audit Rights
description: Client has the right to audit provider's compliance

name: Subcontracting
description: Provider may not subcontract without prior written approval

name: Representations and Warranties
description: Parties represent they have authority to enter agreement

name: Counterparts
description: Agreement may be executed in counterparts

name: Survival
description: Specified provisions survive termination of agreement

name: Independent Contractor
description: Relationship is that of independent contractors, not employer-employee
